title: Hideaki Anno Schizo Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Hideaki Anno Schizo . Evangelion             Quote Post by NAveryW » Fri Jul 02, 2010 9:45 pm This is a book released in 1997 which consists of a collection of interviews divided into three parts. Part I is a lengthy interview with Hideaki Anno, split into four chapters: "We Have Nothing", "How to Finish the Story", "Be Creative and Masturbate", and " Devilman and the Oedipus Complex". Part II... Forgive me. I still have trouble talking about it. But SSD translates the title as "Part Two: Evangelion Hideaki Anno's staff "Judgment by default" (First part)". Yes, Part Two is called "First Part". Part III is titled "What is Rei?" We still have buttloads of untranslated Anno interviews, so of course we're never going to reap the fruits of Hideaki Anno Schizo ・ Evangelion . I just thought I'd bring it up because I just discovered it, and the release of a lengthy collection of interviews about Eva as far back as 1997 shows that Anno wasn't as tight-lipped about his creation as he seems to be thought of as here. I mean, there's a whole lot on the production process and a whole chapter called "How to Finish the Story". Also, for God's sake, if any of the translations I've given are wrong, correct me. I'm inclined to think chapter two is actually called "Creation is Masturbation", but SSD sai-

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Jul 02, 2010 9:54 pm We need more resources about Anno and more resources in general... Sigh. Also, Naw, I believe it's "First Part" as in "first part of the Anno/staff discussion".

[]:             Quote Post by Sun Stealer » Thu Jul 08, 2010 10:40 am Yeah, but the problem is that Anno seems to sew misinformation and purposefully contradict himself in each interview he gives.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Jul 08, 2010 9:57 pm Sun Stealer wrote: Yeah, but the problem is that Anno seems to sew misinformation and purposefully contradict himself in each interview he gives.

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Sun Jul 11, 2010 2:11 am Um. Would anyone happen to have the text of this, moonspeak or otherwise?

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Sun Jul 11, 2010 2:26 am You can order it from Amazon JP and probably some other retailers. I haven't been able to find any of the exact text, but a synopsis of "The Work is a Masturbation Show" (the correct translation of the second chapter; SSD and I were way off) is available here , so perhaps other chaper synopses are also available on the site. I'm guessing it's even more screwed up than what Google's translation made it out to be. Something about a play Anno and Miyazaki attended in which the actors st-... Well, you can Google translate it yourself and your interpretation is as likely to be accurate as mine. Or you can provide an actual translation if you're able and inclined.

[]:             Quote Post by AyrYntake » Sun Jul 11, 2010 8:36 am Gah. I would if I had the money to spare.

[]:             Quote Post by gwern » Thu Jun 09, 2011 9:57 pm It seems to me that discussion on Schizo/Prano is of higher quality in http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=10342 ; perhaps this thread should be locked.
